reviews.comment:
Ypf ACA.  comparado con las estaciones de Opessa está lejos en presentación de la estación y servicios para el cliente. No cobran con QR y no hay 24 hs de Full.

(Translated by Google)
YPF ACA, compared to Opessa stations, is far superior in terms of station presentation and customer service. They don't accept QR code payments and there's no 24-hour fuel delivery.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvLUpuUTJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mala atención y lentos. Si sos socio o tenés buen auto te atienden bien y hasta te limpian el vidrio

(Translated by Google)
Poor service and slow. If you're a member or have a nice car, they treat you well and even clean your windshield.
